notes:
• Version label now sourced from assembly automatically — splash, title bar, footer, and window title all stay in sync
• Side panel widened to 320px with bolder typography for better readability
• New 'Region' field in side panel — auto-detected from build version (OP, RU, EU, TR, IN, ID, PH, etc.)
• Results table redesigned: locked columns (no resize/reorder), wrap-enabled cells, no horizontal scroll, no Excel-style gridlines
• Date column shows date only — full timestamp moved to side panel
• Brand badges no longer clipped
• NMark column removed from table (still visible in side panel)
• Action column removed — Download lives only in the side panel for more table space
• Fixed white strip at top of window (DWM resize-grip artifact)
• Window control buttons: proper icons, polished hover states, Microsoft-red close button
• New themed scrollbar — slim magenta-purple thumb with glow, no arrow buttons
